records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't remember clearly because it's been about a month...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't remember clearly because it's been about a month...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't remember clearly because it's been about a month...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! Yes. There were <color=#ffd34c>writings</color> next to the corpse in chalk.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! Yes. There were <color=#ffd34c>writings</color> next to the corpse in chalk.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! Yes. There were <color=#ffd34c>writings</color> next to the corpse in chalk.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, what was it...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, what was it...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, what was it...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>A part of the body</color> was cut from the corpse with what looked like a sharp blade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>A part of the body</color> was cut from the corpse with what looked like a sharp blade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>A part of the body</color> was cut from the corpse with what looked like a sharp blade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As for the second victim I saw...
records.m_Talk_DEU: As for the second victim I saw...
records.m_Talk_FRA: As for the second victim I saw...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That night, I saw a large person wearing black armor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That night, I saw a large person wearing black armor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That night, I saw a large person wearing black armor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I looked away for a second and no one was there... I'm telling you the truth! I know what I saw!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I looked away for a second and no one was there... I'm telling you the truth! I know what I saw!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I looked away for a second and no one was there... I'm telling you the truth! I know what I saw!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sun is about to rise. Let's end our investigation here for tonight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sun is about to rise. Let's end our investigation here for tonight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sun is about to rise. Let's end our investigation here for tonight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, shall we try to summarize the information we've collected so far?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, shall we try to summarize the information we've collected so far?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, shall we try to summarize the information we've collected so far?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please make it as clear as possible, Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please make it as clear as possible, Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please make it as clear as possible, Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. I also want to end this quickly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. I also want to end this quickly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. I also want to end this quickly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The two incidents committed by the Midnight Killer have a few <color=#ffd34c>commonalities</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The two incidents committed by the Midnight Killer have a few <color=#ffd34c>commonalities</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The two incidents committed by the Midnight Killer have a few <color=#ffd34c>commonalities</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One is that a sharp metal blade was used, and another is that the certain parts of the body were mutilated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One is that a sharp metal blade was used, and another is that the certain parts of the body were mutilated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One is that a sharp metal blade was used, and another is that the certain parts of the body were mutilated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, there was a writing of some sort left behind on the scene.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, there was a writing of some sort left behind on the scene.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, there was a writing of some sort left behind on the scene.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not bad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not bad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not bad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's enough of an overview. Could you summarize the victims this time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's enough of an overview. Could you summarize the victims this time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's enough of an overview. Could you summarize the victims this time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The first victim was Marie Ann Nicholes who worked at a hat shop.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The first victim was Marie Ann Nicholes who worked at a hat shop.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The first victim was Marie Ann Nicholes who worked at a hat shop.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seventeen years old. Born on June 30th. And had her <color=#ffd34c>chest</color> mutilated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seventeen years old. Born on June 30th. And had her <color=#ffd34c>chest</color> mutilated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seventeen years old. Born on June 30th. And had her <color=#ffd34c>chest</color> mutilated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to witness statements, the writing left on the scene is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to witness statements, the writing left on the scene is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to witness statements, the writing left on the scene is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Let her come through the first ordeal to me. And she will be as silver.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Let her come through the first ordeal to me. And she will be as silver.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Let her come through the first ordeal to me. And she will be as silver.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, well. I'm not sure what that's supposed to mean.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, well. I'm not sure what that's supposed to mean.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, well. I'm not sure what that's supposed to mean.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And our second victim was a housewife named Honey Chapman.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And our second victim was a housewife named Honey Chapman.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And our second victim was a housewife named Honey Chapman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Twenty-one years old. Born on January 23rd. Her right <color=#ffd34c>knee</color> was severely damaged.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Twenty-one years old. Born on January 23rd. Her right <color=#ffd34c>knee</color> was severely damaged.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Twenty-one years old. Born on January 23rd. Her right <color=#ffd34c>knee</color> was severely damaged.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The writing read: <color=#ffd34c>Go through the second ordeal. For she will be sturdy like lead.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: The writing read: <color=#ffd34c>Go through the second ordeal. For she will be sturdy like lead.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: The writing read: <color=#ffd34c>Go through the second ordeal. For she will be sturdy like lead.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Well, that should be all of the important things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Well, that should be all of the important things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Well, that should be all of the important things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Wonderful memory you've got.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Wonderful memory you've got.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Wonderful memory you've got.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? Did you find out anything?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? Did you find out anything?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? Did you find out anything?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not going to say that you don't know after making a prima donna act as your assistant, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not going to say that you don't know after making a prima donna act as your assistant, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not going to say that you don't know after making a prima donna act as your assistant, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, of course, not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, of course, not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, of course, not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think I know why the Midnight Killer is mutilating corpses, at least.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think I know why the Midnight Killer is mutilating corpses, at least.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think I know why the Midnight Killer is mutilating corpses, at least.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. I'll call that bluff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. I'll call that bluff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. I'll call that bluff.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
With just a few statements, how could you
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
With just a few statements, how could you
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
With just a few statements, how could you

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's elementary, my dear Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's elementary, my dear Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's elementary, my dear Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Try to remember what the statement the Midnight Killer sent said before we got here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Try to remember what the statement the Midnight Killer sent said before we got here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Try to remember what the statement the Midnight Killer sent said before we got here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The statement?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The statement?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The statement?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. His statement said that he was after Supernaturals.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. His statement said that he was after Supernaturals.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. His statement said that he was after Supernaturals.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that he would find and cut out their <color=#ffd34c>marks</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that he would find and cut out their <color=#ffd34c>marks</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that he would find and cut out their <color=#ffd34c>marks</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You should also know the meaning of the mark as you're also a Supernatural.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You should also know the meaning of the mark as you're also a Supernatural.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You should also know the meaning of the mark as you're also a Supernatural.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Of course, I do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. Of course, I do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. Of course, I do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Supernaturals each obtain a <color=#ffd34c>mark</color> of their own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Supernaturals each obtain a <color=#ffd34c>mark</color> of their own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Supernaturals each obtain a <color=#ffd34c>mark</color> of their own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the mark that grants them their powers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the mark that grants them their powers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the mark that grants them their powers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For me, that mark is this <color=#ffd34c>pocket watch</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For me, that mark is this <color=#ffd34c>pocket watch</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For me, that mark is this <color=#ffd34c>pocket watch</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was something my grandfather left me when I was little. But at the time, I didn't know it was a mark.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was something my grandfather left me when I was little. But at the time, I didn't know it was a mark.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was something my grandfather left me when I was little. But at the time, I didn't know it was a mark.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It's known that people receive their marks naturally in their own way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It's known that people receive their marks naturally in their own way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It's known that people receive their marks naturally in their own way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? What does the mark have to do with the case? He can't cut off my pocket watch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? What does the mark have to do with the case? He can't cut off my pocket watch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? What does the mark have to do with the case? He can't cut off my pocket watch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, cut off? Could it be...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, cut off? Could it be...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, cut off? Could it be...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: While solving various cases, I learned something about Supernaturals.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While solving various cases, I learned something about Supernaturals.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While solving various cases, I learned something about Supernaturals.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are some, like you, who got special powers by coming into contact with an object.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are some, like you, who got special powers by coming into contact with an object.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are some, like you, who got special powers by coming into contact with an object.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And there are also those who have had marks suddenly appear on their bodies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And there are also those who have had marks suddenly appear on their bodies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And there are also those who have had marks suddenly appear on their bodies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then that means...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then that means...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then that means...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Midnight Killer is mutilating the victims' corpses <color=#ffd34c>to obtain the marks that appeared on their bodies</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Midnight Killer is mutilating the victims' corpses <color=#ffd34c>to obtain the marks that appeared on their bodies</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Midnight Killer is mutilating the victims' corpses <color=#ffd34c>to obtain the marks that appeared on their bodies</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I'm glad you understand quickly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I'm glad you understand quickly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I'm glad you understand quickly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we approach it like that, the writings he left can be seen from a different perspective.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we approach it like that, the writings he left can be seen from a different perspective.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we approach it like that, the writings he left can be seen from a different perspective.

records.m_Talk_DEU: A different perspective? Like what...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A different perspective? Like what...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shouldn't my explanation thus far be enough? How about you use your brain this time?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Shouldn't my explanation thus far be enough? How about you use your brain this time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Krgh! I knew it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. You don't think I can do it...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. You don't think I can do it...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The first ordeal... She will be as silver.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The first ordeal... She will be as silver.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The first ordeal... She will be as silver.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The second ordeal, she will be sturdy like lead...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The second ordeal, she will be sturdy like lead...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The second ordeal, she will be sturdy like lead...

records.m_Talk_DEU: The ordeals aren't the results, they are the process.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ordeals aren't the results, they are the process.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And... if the results are silver and lead...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And... if the results are silver and lead...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And... if the results are silver and lead...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I get it now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I get it now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I get it now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those writings refer to a certain <color=#ffd34c>process</color>.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Those writings refer to a certain <color=#ffd34c>process</color>.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Is that why you said it was like a ritual...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. That's correct.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. That's correct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew you showed potential. My eyes are never wrong.

records.m_Talk_DEU: A route to obtain information?

records.m_Talk_DEU: In London, Supernaturals are both hated and feared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, there was a writing of some sort left behind on the scene.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, there was a writing of some sort left behind on the scene.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, there was a writing of some sort left behind on the scene.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not bad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not bad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not bad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's enough of an overview. Could you summarize the victims this time?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's enough of an overview. Could you summarize the victims this time?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's enough of an overview. Could you summarize the victims this time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The first victim was Marie Ann Nicholes who worked at a hat shop.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The first victim was Marie Ann Nicholes who worked at a hat shop.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The first victim was Marie Ann Nicholes who worked at a hat shop.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seventeen years old. Born on June 30th. And had her <color=#ffd34c>chest</color> mutilated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seventeen years old. Born on June 30th. And had her <color=#ffd34c>chest</color> mutilated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seventeen years old. Born on June 30th. And had her <color=#ffd34c>chest</color> mutilated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: According to witness statements, the writing left on the scene is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: According to witness statements, the writing left on the scene is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: According to witness statements, the writing left on the scene is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Let her come through the first ordeal to me. And she will be as silver.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Let her come through the first ordeal to me. And she will be as silver.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Let her come through the first ordeal to me. And she will be as silver.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, well. I'm not sure what that's supposed to mean.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, well. I'm not sure what that's supposed to mean.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, well. I'm not sure what that's supposed to mean.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And our second victim was a housewife named Honey Chapman.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And our second victim was a housewife named Honey Chapman.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And our second victim was a housewife named Honey Chapman.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Twenty-one years old. Born on January 23rd. Her right <color=#ffd34c>knee</color> was severely damaged.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Twenty-one years old. Born on January 23rd. Her right <color=#ffd34c>knee</color> was severely damaged.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Twenty-one years old. Born on January 23rd. Her right <color=#ffd34c>knee</color> was severely damaged.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The writing read: <color=#ffd34c>Go through the second ordeal. For she will be sturdy like lead.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: The writing read: <color=#ffd34c>Go through the second ordeal. For she will be sturdy like lead.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: The writing read: <color=#ffd34c>Go through the second ordeal. For she will be sturdy like lead.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Well, that should be all of the important things.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Well, that should be all of the important things.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Well, that should be all of the important things.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Wonderful memory you've got.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Wonderful memory you've got.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Wonderful memory you've got.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? Did you find out anything?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? Did you find out anything?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? Did you find out anything?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're not going to say that you don't know after making a prima donna act as your assistant, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're not going to say that you don't know after making a prima donna act as your assistant, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're not going to say that you don't know after making a prima donna act as your assistant, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, of course, not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, of course, not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, of course, not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think I know why the Midnight Killer is mutilating corpses, at least.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think I know why the Midnight Killer is mutilating corpses, at least.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think I know why the Midnight Killer is mutilating corpses, at least.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. I'll call that bluff.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. I'll call that bluff.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. I'll call that bluff.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
With just a few statements, how could you
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
With just a few statements, how could you
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
With just a few statements, how could you
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's elementary, my dear Swan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's elementary, my dear Swan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's elementary, my dear Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Try to remember what the statement the Midnight Killer sent said before we got here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Try to remember what the statement the Midnight Killer sent said before we got here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Try to remember what the statement the Midnight Killer sent said before we got here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The statement?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The statement?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The statement?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. His statement said that he was after Supernaturals.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. His statement said that he was after Supernaturals.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. His statement said that he was after Supernaturals.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that he would find and cut out their <color=#ffd34c>marks</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that he would find and cut out their <color=#ffd34c>marks</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that he would find and cut out their <color=#ffd34c>marks</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You should also know the meaning of the mark as you're also a Supernatural.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You should also know the meaning of the mark as you're also a Supernatural.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You should also know the meaning of the mark as you're also a Supernatural.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Of course, I do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. Of course, I do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. Of course, I do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Supernaturals each obtain a <color=#ffd34c>mark</color> of their own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Supernaturals each obtain a <color=#ffd34c>mark</color> of their own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Supernaturals each obtain a <color=#ffd34c>mark</color> of their own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the mark that grants them their powers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the mark that grants them their powers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the mark that grants them their powers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For me, that mark is this <color=#ffd34c>pocket watch</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For me, that mark is this <color=#ffd34c>pocket watch</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For me, that mark is this <color=#ffd34c>pocket watch</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was something my grandfather left me when I was little. But at the time, I didn't know it was a mark.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was something my grandfather left me when I was little. But at the time, I didn't know it was a mark.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was something my grandfather left me when I was little. But at the time, I didn't know it was a mark.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It's known that people receive their marks naturally in their own way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It's known that people receive their marks naturally in their own way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It's known that people receive their marks naturally in their own way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? What does the mark have to do with the case? He can't cut off my pocket watch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? What does the mark have to do with the case? He can't cut off my pocket watch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? What does the mark have to do with the case? He can't cut off my pocket watch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, cut off? Could it be...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, cut off? Could it be...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, cut off? Could it be...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: While solving various cases, I learned something about Supernaturals.
root.m_Talk_DEU: While solving various cases, I learned something about Supernaturals.
root.m_Talk_FRA: While solving various cases, I learned something about Supernaturals.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are some, like you, who got special powers by coming into contact with an object.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are some, like you, who got special powers by coming into contact with an object.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are some, like you, who got special powers by coming into contact with an object.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And there are also those who have had marks suddenly appear on their bodies.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And there are also those who have had marks suddenly appear on their bodies.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And there are also those who have had marks suddenly appear on their bodies.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then that means...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then that means...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then that means...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Midnight Killer is mutilating the victims' corpses <color=#ffd34c>to obtain the marks that appeared on their bodies</color>?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Midnight Killer is mutilating the victims' corpses <color=#ffd34c>to obtain the marks that appeared on their bodies</color>?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Midnight Killer is mutilating the victims' corpses <color=#ffd34c>to obtain the marks that appeared on their bodies</color>?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I'm glad you understand quickly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I'm glad you understand quickly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I'm glad you understand quickly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we approach it like that, the writings he left can be seen from a different perspective.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we approach it like that, the writings he left can be seen from a different perspective.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we approach it like that, the writings he left can be seen from a different perspective.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A different perspective? Like what...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A different perspective? Like what...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A different perspective? Like what...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shouldn't my explanation thus far be enough? How about you use your brain this time?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Shouldn't my explanation thus far be enough? How about you use your brain this time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Krgh! I knew it!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Krgh! I knew it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. You don't think I can do it...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. You don't think I can do it...?!

root.m_Talk_DEU: The first ordeal... She will be as silver.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The first ordeal... She will be as silver.

root.m_Talk_DEU: The second ordeal, she will be sturdy like lead...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The second ordeal, she will be sturdy like lead...

root.m_Talk_DEU: The ordeals aren't the results, they are the process.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The ordeals aren't the results, they are the process.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And... if the results are silver and lead...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And... if the results are silver and lead...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And... if the results are silver and lead...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I get it now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I get it now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I get it now!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Those writings refer to a certain <color=#ffd34c>process</color>.

root.m_Talk_FRA: The Midnight Killer is collecting the marks of his victims according to a certain order.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Is that why you said it was like a ritual...?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Silver and lead. If I can find a metaphor that uses those two as keywords...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe we can stop the Midnight Killer before he commits another murder.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe we can stop the Midnight Killer before he commits another murder.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. That's correct.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. That's correct.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. That's correct.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I knew you showed potential. My eyes are never wrong.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I knew you showed potential. My eyes are never wrong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...H-hmph!

root.m_Talk_FRA: ...H-hmph!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Again with your nonsense! I'm not happy at all to be praised by a blackmailer like you!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Again with your nonsense! I'm not happy at all to be praised by a blackmailer like you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is one thing we need to think about in advance before finding out this procedure of his.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is one thing we need to think about in advance before finding out this procedure of his.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is one thing we need to think about in advance before finding out this procedure of his.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is a route to obtain information.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is a route to obtain information.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is a route to obtain information.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A route to obtain information?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A route to obtain information?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A route to obtain information?

root.m_Talk_ENG: In London, Supernaturals are both hated and feared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In London, Supernaturals are both hated and feared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In London, Supernaturals are both hated and feared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Due to the Shadow incident, the public sees them as walking time bombs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Due to the Shadow incident, the public sees them as walking time bombs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Due to the Shadow incident, the public sees them as walking time bombs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But those people didn't obtain special powers because they wanted to. So, they have no choice but to hide it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But those people didn't obtain special powers because they wanted to. So, they have no choice but to hide it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But those people didn't obtain special powers because they wanted to. So, they have no choice but to hide it.

root.m_Talk_FRA: The Midnight Killer already has all the information he needs about those hiding their special powers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see. The Midnight Killer is targeting victims who fit the procedure...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see. The Midnight Killer is targeting victims who fit the procedure...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see. The Midnight Killer is targeting victims who fit the procedure...

root.m_Talk_FRA: And the victims are Supernaturals <color=#ffd34c>with a mark on their bodies</color>.

root.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, the key will be in how the Midnight Killer obtained information about his target.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Being able to see that far in such a short period of time with only bits of information...

root.m_Talk_DEU: It angers me, but I have to admit this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You really are good at what you do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You really are good at what you do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You really are good at what you do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you are an odd one to waste such talents on trivial matters...
